% check a.php
a.php:10:1: $val is of type: mixed (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

enum Option: string
{
	case YES = 'yes';
	case NO  = 'no';
}

$val = Option::YES;
#debugType $val

% check b.php

-- b.php --
<?php

enum Status: int
{
	case ACTIVE = 1;
	case INACTIVE = 0;
}

$s = Status::from(1);
$t = Status::tryFrom(1);
